source_name: Code4rena Reflector V3 Findings & Analysis Report (2025-10)
finding_title: Expiration vector length mismatch causes panic in extend_ttl() when assets are added with zero initial expiration period
summary: Reflector V3 在 asset registry 中维护资产列表与 expiration vector。零初始 expiration 的新增资产会造成两个向量长度不一致，后续 extend_ttl() 按资产索引读取 expiration 时 panic，导致维护或查询流程 DoS。
root_cause: parallel vectors for assets and expirations are allowed to diverge when zero-expiration assets are added, so TTL extension indexes into missing expiration entries
broken_invariants: every registered asset must have a corresponding expiration/TTL entry before indexed maintenance
storage lifecycle maintenance must not panic on valid asset-addition parameters
attack_preconditions: 攻击者或授权数据发布者能够添加带零初始 expiration 的资产
后续有人调用 extend_ttl 或依赖 TTL 维护流程
attacker_capability: user or publisher able to trigger asset registration parameters accepted by the contract
trigger_actions: add asset with zero initial expiration period
call extend_ttl after asset and expiration vectors have diverged

impact.description: TTL extension panics, blocking maintenance of oracle assets and potentially affecting dependent price feeds

why_not_higher: 影响主要是可用性/维护 DoS，不是直接盗取资产。
why_not_lower: Soroban storage TTL 是链上状态生命周期边界；维护入口 panic 会影响真实 oracle 可用性。
common_false_positive_angles: 确认 vector 长度是否已经通过统一 struct/map 绑定
确认零 expiration 是否被所有入口拒绝
确认 panic 是否导致整笔交易回滚而不是安全跳过
mitigations: 资产与 expiration 使用同一结构存储，或在添加资产时始终写入默认 expiration；extend_ttl 前校验长度一致。
